fixture: 030_delete_reinsert_select

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE archive (id INTEGER NOT NULL, flag INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO archive VALUES (1, 1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    DELETE FROM archive WHERE id = 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO archive VALUES (2, 0)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id, flag FROM archive
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] flag INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2 | 0
